name: TEAMGROUP MP44 1TB M.2-2280 PCIe 4.0 x4 with NVMe Internal Solid State Drive - Heat Dissipating Graphene Label - 3D TLC NAND - SLC Caching - Read up to 7,400 MB/s - Write up to 6,500 MB/s - 1450TBW (TM8FPW001T0C101)
